description: A severe memory leak has been reported in our local photo gallery app. Firefox is already running with the app loaded at http://localhost:8080/. Open the Firefox Developer Tools Memory panel and capture a baseline heap snapshot, saving it to ~/Documents/baseline.fxsnapshot. Then, interact with the app to trigger the memory leak: first click 'Load High-Res Gallery', wait a second for it to render, and then click 'Destroy Gallery'. Finally, take a second heap snapshot and save it to ~/Documents/leaked.fxsnapshot. Do not worry if Firefox appends an extra .fxsnapshot extension when saving.
